name: visual-proof-pi-package
description: Dependency-free Pi package for Visual Proof Objects and deterministic UI visual predicate verification.

extensions.name: Visual Proof
extensions.description: Registers tools for creating, evaluating, and reporting Visual Proof Objects.

skills.name: Visual Proof
skills.description: Proof-only workflow for creating and evaluating Visual Proof Objects from supplied metadata, primitives, predicates, and evidence.

skills.name: Visual Primitives
skills.description: Drawing and pointing workflow for producing VP1-compatible boxes, points, and paths from supplied screenshots.
